provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, tall athletic female reptilian alien with olive-bronze overlapping scales and a sleek angular snout, narrower crest ridge than males with decorative notching filed into it, amber slit-pupil eyes with a calculating expression, muscular tail with a knotted leather tail-guard, wearing burnished bronze chest armor with a single asymmetric pauldron on the weapon arm over dark leather, a dark crimson half-cape draped over the non-weapon shoulder, leather arm wraps with bronze studs, a curved short sword at the hip, the armor has deliberate scratches she treats as decoration
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: Veshan faction. Forged material vocabulary with overlapping scales, dark bronze plate, leather underpadding. Martial culture expressed through gear.
